parameters.command:
for service in backend billing-worker billing-webhook-consumer webhook-outbox-relay email-consumer email-outbox-relay change-subscription-worker financial-account-balance-snapshot-worker church-documents-retention-worker; do
  cid=$(docker ps --filter "label=com.docker.compose.project=feconect" --filter "label=com.docker.compose.service=$service" -q | head -n 1)
  if [ -n "$cid" ]; then
    docker logs --since 5m "$cid" 2>&1 | sed "s/^/[${service}] /"
  fi
done

parameters.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT ((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date - INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS day_ref
), payments AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_events,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED'))::int AS success_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status NOT IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED'))::int AS failure_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(value) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED')), 0)::text AS success_amount
  FROM public.subscription_payments sp
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at))::date = b.day_ref
), failed_webhooks AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS failed_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE attempts >= 3)::int AS critical_count
  FROM public.gateway_webhook_events gwe
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at))::date = b.day_ref
    AND gwe.status = 'FAILED'
), peak_hour AS (
  SELECT LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at)))::text, 2, '0') AS peak_hour
  FROM public.subscription_payments sp
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at))::date = b.day_ref
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, 1 ASC
  LIMIT 1
), emails AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE status = 'DONE'
        AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(processed_at, updated_at, created_at))::date = b.day_ref
    )::int AS email_done_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE status <> 'DONE'
        AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(updated_at, created_at))::date = b.day_ref
    )::int AS email_failed_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status <> 'DONE')::int AS email_pending_backlog
  FROM public.email_outbox_events eo
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
), catalog AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.users) AS total_users,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.churches WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS total_churches,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.events) AS total_events_catalog,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.members m WHERE m.role = 'Membro') AS total_members,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.members m WHERE m.role = 'Colaborador') AS total_collaborators,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.assemblies) AS total_assemblies,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.church_documents cd WHERE cd.deleted_at IS NULL) AS total_documents,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.financial_transactions ft) AS total_financial_transactions,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.users u CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', u.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_users,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.churches c CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', c.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_churches,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.events e CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', e.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.members m CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE m.role = 'Membro' AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', m.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_members,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.members m CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE m.role = 'Colaborador' AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', m.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_collaborators,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.assemblies a CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', a.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_assemblies,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.church_documents cd CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE cd.deleted_at IS NULL AND timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', cd.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_documents,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.financial_transactions ft CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', ft.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS new_financial_transactions,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.financial_reconciliations fr CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', fr.created_at)::date = b.day_ref) AS daily_reconciliations
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(b.day_ref, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS local_day,
  TO_CHAR(b.day_ref::timestamp, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS report_window_start_local,
  TO_CHAR((b.day_ref::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day' - INTERVAL '1 second'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS report_window_end_local,
  'America/Sao_Paulo' AS report_window_timezone,
  p.total_events,
  p.success_count,
  p.failure_count,
  CASE
    WHEN p.total_events = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE ROUND((p.failure_count::numeric / p.total_events::numeric) * 100, 2)
  END AS failure_rate_pct,
  p.success_amount,
  fw.failed_count AS webhook_failed_count,
  fw.critical_count,
  COALESCE(ph.peak_hour, 'n/d') AS peak_hour,
  e.email_done_count,
  e.email_failed_count,
  e.email_pending_backlog,
  c.total_users,
  c.total_churches,
  c.total_events_catalog,
  c.total_members,
  c.total_collaborators,
  c.total_assemblies,
  c.total_documents,
  c.total_financial_transactions,
  c.new_users,
  c.new_churches,
  c.new_events,
  c.new_members,
  c.new_collaborators,
  c.new_assemblies,
  c.new_documents,
  c.new_financial_transactions,
  c.daily_reconciliations
FROM bounds b
CROSS JOIN payments p
CROSS JOIN failed_webhooks fw
CROSS JOIN emails e
CROSS JOIN catalog c
LEFT JOIN peak_hour ph ON TRUE;

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, time, timedelta, timezone
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
import collections
import json
import re
import subprocess
import urllib.error
import urllib.request

services = [
    'backend',
    'billing-worker',
    'billing-webhook-consumer',
    'webhook-outbox-relay',
    'email-consumer',
    'email-outbox-relay',
    'change-subscription-worker',
    'financial-account-balance-snapshot-worker',
    'church-documents-retention-worker',
]
ping_url = 'https://pedro-duarte.ddns.net/feconnect/api/ping'
ansi_re = re.compile(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m')
http_re = re.compile(r'"([A-Z]+) ([^\s]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+" (\d{3})')
critical_re = re.compile(r'"level":"error"|"severity":"error"|\b(error|erro|fatal|panic|critical|crit|exception|uncaught|falha|falhou|failed|failure|timeout|timed out|refused|unavailable)\b', re.I)
warn_re = re.compile(r'"level":"warn"|"severity":"warn"|\bwarn(ing)?\b', re.I)
benign_re = [
    re.compile(r'get /metrics', re.I),
    re.compile(r'nenhum evento elegivel para replay', re.I),
    re.compile(r'no email outbox events eligible for replay', re.I),
    re.compile(r'executando replay de eventos de webhook pendentes/falhos', re.I),
]

summary = {
    'day_ref': None,
    'report_window_start_local': None,
    'report_window_end_local': None,
    'report_window_timezone': 'America/Sao_Paulo',
    'report_window_start_utc': None,
    'report_window_end_utc': None,
    'app_ping_status': 'OFF',
    'app_ping_http_status': None,
    'app_ping_latency_ms': None,
    'app_ping_checked_at': None,
    'app_ping_error': None,
    'http_requests_total': 0,
    'http_2xx': 0,
    'http_3xx': 0,
    'http_4xx': 0,
    'http_5xx': 0,
    'top_paths': [],
    'error_paths': [],
    'errors_by_service': {},
    'warns_by_service': {},
}

try:
    local_tz = ZoneInfo('America/Sao_Paulo')
    now_local = datetime.now(local_tz)
    day_ref = now_local.date() - timedelta(days=1)
    start_local = datetime.combine(day_ref, time.min, tzinfo=local_tz)
    end_local = start_local + timedelta(days=1)
    since = start_local.astimezone(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace('+00:00', 'Z')
    until = end_local.astimezone(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace('+00:00', 'Z')
    summary['day_ref'] = str(day_ref)
    summary['report_window_start_local'] = start_local.strftime('%H:%M:%S')
    summary['report_window_end_local'] = (end_local - timedelta(seconds=1)).strftime('%H:%M:%S')
    summary['report_window_start_utc'] = since
    summary['report_window_end_utc'] = until
    summary['app_ping_checked_at'] = now_local.isoformat()

    ping_started = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    request = urllib.request.Request(
        ping_url,
        headers={
            'User-Agent': 'n8n-feconect-daily-summary/1.0',
            'Accept': 'application/json,text/plain,*/*',
        },
    )
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=10) as response:
            ping_finished = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
            summary['app_ping_http_status'] = getattr(response, 'status', None)
            summary['app_ping_latency_ms'] = round((ping_finished - ping_started).total_seconds() * 1000, 2)
            if 200 <= (summary['app_ping_http_status'] or 0) < 400:
                summary['app_ping_status'] = 'ON'
            else:
                summary['app_ping_error'] = f'HTTP {summary["app_ping_http_status"]}'
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:
        ping_finished = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        summary['app_ping_http_status'] = exc.code
        summary['app_ping_latency_ms'] = round((ping_finished - ping_started).total_seconds() * 1000, 2)
        summary['app_ping_error'] = f'HTTP {exc.code}'
    except Exception as exc:
        ping_finished = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        summary['app_ping_latency_ms'] = round((ping_finished - ping_started).total_seconds() * 1000, 2)
        summary['app_ping_error'] = str(exc)

    path_counts = collections.Counter()
    error_path_counts = collections.Counter()
    errors_by_service = collections.Counter()
    warns_by_service = collections.Counter()

    for service in services:
        cid_proc = subprocess.run(
            [
                'docker', 'ps',
                '--filter', 'label=com.docker.compose.project=feconect',
                '--filter', f'label=com.docker.compose.service={service}',
                '-q',
            ],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
        )
        cids = [line.strip() for line in cid_proc.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]
        if not cids:
            continue

        logs_proc = subprocess.run(
            ['docker', 'logs', '--since', since, '--until', until, cids[0]],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
        )
        text = (logs_proc.stdout or '') + ('\n' + logs_proc.stderr if logs_proc.stderr else '')

        for raw in text.splitlines():
            line = ansi_re.sub('', raw).strip()
            if not line:
                continue

            http_match = http_re.search(line)
            if service == 'backend' and http_match:
                _, path, status_text = http_match.groups()
                if path.startswith('/metrics'):
                    continue
                status = int(status_text)
                summary['http_requests_total'] += 1
                if 200 <= status < 300:
                    summary['http_2xx'] += 1
                elif 300 <= status < 400:
                    summary['http_3xx'] += 1
                elif 400 <= status < 500:
                    summary['http_4xx'] += 1
                elif 500 <= status < 600:
                    summary['http_5xx'] += 1

                normalized = re.sub(r'/[0-9a-fA-F-]{8,}', '/:id', path.split('?')[0])
                path_counts[normalized] += 1
                if status >= 400:
                    error_path_counts[f'{normalized} ({status})'] += 1
                continue

            if any(pattern.search(line) for pattern in benign_re):
                continue

            if critical_re.search(line):
                errors_by_service[service] += 1
            elif warn_re.search(line):
                warns_by_service[service] += 1

    summary['top_paths'] = [f'{path} ({count})' for path, count in path_counts.most_common(3)]
    summary['error_paths'] = [f'{path} ({count})' for path, count in error_path_counts.most_common(3)]
    summary['errors_by_service'] = dict(errors_by_service)
    summary['warns_by_service'] = dict(warns_by_service)
except Exception as exc:
    summary['_meta_error'] = str(exc)

print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=True))

PY

parameters.query:
WITH current_payments AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS current_ok
  FROM public.subscription_payments sp
  WHERE COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at) >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
    AND sp.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED')
), historical_payments AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(AVG(bucket.qty), 0)::numeric AS avg_ok
  FROM (
    SELECT
      date_trunc('hour', timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at))) AS bucket_hour,
      COUNT(*)::numeric AS qty
    FROM public.subscription_payments sp
    WHERE COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at) >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '14 days'
      AND COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at) < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
      AND sp.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED')
      AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(sp.last_gateway_event_at, sp.paid_at, sp.updated_at, sp.created_at))) = EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
    GROUP BY 1
  ) AS bucket
), current_failed_webhooks AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS current_failed
  FROM public.gateway_webhook_events gwe
  WHERE COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at) >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
    AND gwe.status = 'FAILED'
), historical_failed_webhooks AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(AVG(bucket.qty), 0)::numeric AS avg_failed
  FROM (
    SELECT
      date_trunc('hour', timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at))) AS bucket_hour,
      COUNT(*)::numeric AS qty
    FROM public.gateway_webhook_events gwe
    WHERE COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at) >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '14 days'
      AND COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at) < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '60 minutes'
      AND gwe.status = 'FAILED'
      AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', COALESCE(gwe.updated_at, gwe.created_at))) = EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timezone('America/Sao_Paulo', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
    GROUP BY 1
  ) AS bucket
)
SELECT
  cp.current_ok,
  hp.avg_ok,
  cfw.current_failed,
  hfw.avg_failed
FROM current_payments cp
CROSS JOIN historical_payments hp
CROSS JOIN current_failed_webhooks cfw
CROSS JOIN historical_failed_webhooks hfw;

name: FeConect - VPS Daily Summary Telegram
description: Resumo diario da VPS com status e metricas essenciais enviado ao Telegram.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import time

summary = {
    'checked_at': None,
    'vps_status': 'ON',
    'uptime_human': 'n/d',
    'load_avg': [],
    'cpu_usage_pct': None,
    'cpu_cores': os.cpu_count() or 0,
    'ram_used_gb': None,
    'ram_total_gb': None,
    'ram_usage_pct': None,
    'swap_used_gb': None,
    'swap_total_gb': None,
    'swap_usage_pct': None,
    'disk_used_gb': None,
    'disk_total_gb': None,
    'disk_usage_pct': None,
    'disk_free_gb': None,
    'disk_mount': '/',
    'inode_usage_pct': None,
    'docker_running_containers': 0,
    'docker_restart_count': 0,
    'top_processes': [],
    'meta_error': None,
}

def to_gb(bytes_value):
    return round(bytes_value / (1024 ** 3), 2)

try:
    now_local = datetime.now(ZoneInfo('America/Sao_Paulo'))
    summary['checked_at'] = now_local.isoformat()

    with open('/proc/uptime', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fh:
        uptime_seconds = float(fh.read().split()[0])
    days = int(uptime_seconds // 86400)
    hours = int((uptime_seconds % 86400) // 3600)
    minutes = int((uptime_seconds % 3600) // 60)
    uptime_parts = []
    if days:
        uptime_parts.append(f'{days}d')
    if hours or days:
        uptime_parts.append(f'{hours}h')
    uptime_parts.append(f'{minutes}m')
    summary['uptime_human'] = ' '.join(uptime_parts)
    summary['load_avg'] = [round(value, 2) for value in os.getloadavg()]

    def read_cpu_times():
        with open('/proc/stat', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fh:
            return [int(value) for value in fh.readline().split()[1:]]

    first = read_cpu_times()
    time.sleep(1)
    second = read_cpu_times()
    idle_delta = (second[3] + second[4]) - (first[3] + first[4])
    total_delta = sum(second) - sum(first)
    if total_delta > 0:
        summary['cpu_usage_pct'] = round((1 - (idle_delta / total_delta)) * 100, 2)

    with open('/proc/meminfo', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fh:
        meminfo = {}
        for line in fh:
            key, raw = line.split(':', 1)
            meminfo[key] = int(raw.strip().split()[0]) * 1024
    mem_total = meminfo.get('MemTotal', 0)
    mem_available = meminfo.get('MemAvailable', 0)
    mem_used = max(mem_total - mem_available, 0)
    summary['ram_total_gb'] = to_gb(mem_total)
    summary['ram_used_gb'] = to_gb(mem_used)
    if mem_total > 0:
        summary['ram_usage_pct'] = round((mem_used / mem_total) * 100, 2)

    swap_total = meminfo.get('SwapTotal', 0)
    swap_free = meminfo.get('SwapFree', 0)
    swap_used = max(swap_total - swap_free, 0)
    summary['swap_total_gb'] = to_gb(swap_total)
    summary['swap_used_gb'] = to_gb(swap_used)
    summary['swap_usage_pct'] = round((swap_used / swap_total) * 100, 2) if swap_total > 0 else 0.0

    disk = shutil.disk_usage('/')
    summary['disk_total_gb'] = to_gb(disk.total)
    summary['disk_used_gb'] = to_gb(disk.used)
    summary['disk_free_gb'] = to_gb(disk.free)
    if disk.total > 0:
        summary['disk_usage_pct'] = round((disk.used / disk.total) * 100, 2)

    inode_proc = subprocess.run(['df', '-i', '/'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    inode_lines = [line for line in inode_proc.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]
    if len(inode_lines) >= 2:
        inode_parts = inode_lines[1].split()
        if len(inode_parts) >= 5:
            summary['inode_usage_pct'] = inode_parts[4]

    docker_ps = subprocess.run(['docker', 'ps', '--format', '{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    running = [line.strip() for line in docker_ps.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]
    summary['docker_running_containers'] = len(running)

    docker_all = subprocess.run(['docker', 'ps', '-a', '--format', '{{.Names}}|{{.RunningFor}}|{{.Status}}'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    restart_count = 0
    for line in docker_all.stdout.splitlines():
        if 'Restarting' in line:
            restart_count += 1
    summary['docker_restart_count'] = restart_count

    top_proc = subprocess.run(['ps', '-eo', 'pid,comm,%cpu,%mem', '--sort=-%cpu'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    for line in top_proc.stdout.splitlines()[1:4]:
        parts = line.split(None, 3)
        if len(parts) == 4:
            summary['top_processes'].append({
                'pid': parts[0],
                'command': parts[1],
                'cpu_pct': parts[2],
                'mem_pct': parts[3],
            })
except Exception as exc:
    summary['vps_status'] = 'OFF'
    summary['meta_error'] = str(exc)

print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=True))

PY

name: Docker Container Health Alerts Telegram
description: Monitora todos os containers Docker via SSH a cada 10 minutos e envia alerta no Telegram somente quando algum container estiver inativo ou unhealthy. O cooldown por servico e configuravel via env CONTAINER_ALERT_COOLDOWN_HOURS.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
import json
import subprocess

result = {
    'checked_at': datetime.now(ZoneInfo('America/Sao_Paulo')).isoformat(),
    'containers': [],
    'meta_error': None,
}

try:
    ids_proc = subprocess.run(['docker', 'ps', '-aq'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    ids = [line.strip() for line in ids_proc.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]

    for cid in ids:
        inspect_proc = subprocess.run(['docker', 'inspect', cid], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
        if inspect_proc.returncode != 0:
            result['containers'].append({
                'name': cid[:12],
                'id': cid[:12],
                'status': 'inspect_error',
                'running': False,
                'health': None,
                'started_at': None,
                'finished_at': None,
                'exit_code': None,
                'error': inspect_proc.stderr.strip() or 'docker inspect failed',
                'compose_project': '',
                'compose_service': '',
                'image': '',
            })
            continue

        raw = json.loads(inspect_proc.stdout)[0]
        state = raw.get('State') or {}
        config = raw.get('Config') or {}
        labels = config.get('Labels') or {}
        name = (raw.get('Name') or '').lstrip('/') or cid[:12]

        result['containers'].append({
            'name': name,
            'id': cid[:12],
            'status': state.get('Status') or 'unknown',
            'running': bool(state.get('Running')),
            'health': (state.get('Health') or {}).get('Status'),
            'started_at': state.get('StartedAt'),
            'finished_at': state.get('FinishedAt'),
            'exit_code': state.get('ExitCode'),
            'error': state.get('Error') or '',
            'compose_project': labels.get('com.docker.compose.project') or '',
            'compose_service': labels.get('com.docker.compose.service') or '',
            'image': config.get('Image') or '',
        })

    result['containers'].sort(key=lambda entry: entry['name'])
except Exception as exc:
    result['meta_error'] = str(exc)

print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=True))
